0: Time to take me demiatma-imbued tools and direct the isle's aether into somethin' truly majestic!

1: A sight o' the likes you've never seen before, eh? A shimmerin', shiftin', multi-layered mesh of aether made malleable, channeled with expert precision...

2: Behold the pinnacle o' weapon fabrication: <SheetEn(Item,2,IntegerParameter(1),1,1)/>!

3: Behold the pinnacle o' weapon an' shield fabrication: <SheetEn(Item,2,IntegerParameter(1),1,1)/> an' <SheetEn(Item,2,IntegerParameter(2),1,1)/>!

4: To marvel at its glory is all well an' good, but the power within's naught but an illusory whisper─a fleetin' phantom, if ye will─until it's awoken in the throes o' battle.

5: All of which is to say, get out there an' wield the bleedin' thing!
